title: TTRP Ore Additions
description: This adds textures for the custom metals, raw ores, and scrap from TallTalesRP!
body:
## This is an <u>unofficial</u> addition to the [TallTalesRP Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/talltalesrp)!
### This pack includes textures for the custom metals, raw ores, alloys, scrap and blocks!
Requires the [TallTalesRP Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/talltalesrp) to function!
This resource pack has [DynamicPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicpack) support!

In order to overwrite the existing textures on **TallTalesRP**, you need to install [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker).

Due to the fact that the current server resource pack is missing textures for the custom ingots and more, I created this quality of life pack to fix that exact issue! 

Textures have been added to the following:

| Basic Metals | Raw Ores | Alloys | Scrap |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| Aluminum Ingot | Raw Aluminum | Bronze Ingot | Bronze Scrap |
| Tin Ingot | Raw Tin | Carbon Steel Ingot | Carbon Steel Scrap |
| Chromium Ingot | Raw Chromium | Stainless Steel Ingot | Stainless Steel Scrap |
| Titanium Ingot | Raw Titanium | Titanium Alloy Ingot | Titanium Alloy Scrap |
| Tungsten Ingot | Raw Tungsten | Tungsten Carbide Ingot | Tungsten Carbide Scrap |

As of the latest release, these textures have also been added:
| Basic Metal Blocks | Metal Alloy Blocks |
| :-: | :-: |
| Block of Aluminum | Block of Bronze |
| Block of Tin | Block of Carbon Steel |
| Block of Chromium | Block of Stainless Steel |
| Block of Titanium | Block of Titanium Alloy |
| Block of Tungsten | Block of Tungsten Carbide |

### Here's what the textures look like so far!
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Added Textures for the Custom Metals](https://i.imgur.com/dTONqLz.png)

</details>

If you need to contact me about bugs with this pack, or want to request an addition to this pack, you can ping me with inquiries on the TTRP Discord! (Linked in the [TallTalesRP Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/talltalesrp)!)
